name: All In One
text: Add your opponent's primary creature's base Atk Dice Rolls and Modifier to the equipped creature. This effect cannot stack.

condition.text: Equipped creature exists and opponent has a primary creature

effects.actionText: Copy opponent primary base Atk Dice Rolls and base Modifier as bonuses
effects.value: Add opponent primary base Atk Dice Rolls and base Modifier

params.valueText: Add opponent primary base Atk Dice Rolls and base Modifier

condition.text: Equipped creature exists and opponent has a primary creature

effects.notes: Do not stack multiple copies of this effect. Track source card so recalculation follows opponent primary creature changes.
